name: Wave Spawner
description: A manager that spawns waves of actors at timed intervals. Tracks current wave number and prints wave announcements. Uses SetTimerByFunctionName for wave timing and a counter variable.

customizable.start_message: Message on game start (default: Wave Spawner Active!)
customizable.spawn_class: Class to spawn each wave (default: Actor)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_WaveSpawner}}
PARENT: Actor

VAR CurrentWave: Int = 0

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="{{start_message|Wave Spawner Active!}}"]
NODE n3: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="SpawnWave", Time={{wave_interval|15.0}}, Looping=true]
NODE n4: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="SpawnWave"]
NODE n5: GetVar [Variable=CurrentWave]
NODE n6: AddFloat [B=1]
NODE n7: SetVar [Variable=CurrentWave]
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="{{wave_message|Wave incoming!}}"]
NODE n9: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n7.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
EXEC n8.Then -> n9.Execute

DATA n5.Value -> n6.A [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.Value [Int]
DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n9.InString [String]

example_spawn.label: WaveSpawner_1
example_spawn.notes: Place above play area. No visual representation needed. Extend by adding SpawnActor nodes inside the SpawnWave custom event.
